name: Gina
description: Gina is an A-Rank mage and was one of the Raid Members in Son Ki-Hoon's Party in an A-Ranked Gate. She has long blonde hair and deep red eyes. Her height is average and she has a very attractive body. Gina has a serious personality this can be seen when she answers Son Ki-Hoon's question about if she was responsible for killing one of the High Orcs.
